title: Weed-cutter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''weed-cutter''' was a fragmentation bomb developed by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and his [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] weapons researchers. It was a smart bomb that was said to be capable of launching over any defensive grid to come down in the heart of enemy troop formations. The weed-cutter exploded at chest height, spraying out tiny, smart, [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] [[Flechette/Legends|flechettes]] in a circular pattern. Against soft targets such as [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], the weapon had a kill zone of 200 meters.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]''
